description: Figure 2: Vanilla RAG versus the proposed order-preserve the RAG. As shown in the example, a long document is cropped into 13 chunks, {c_i}_{i=1}^{13}. The similarity score is appended to each chunk. We retrieve top 4 chunks with the highest similarity scores. Vanilla RAG places the chunks in a score-descending order, whereas the proposed order-preserve RAG places the chunks based on the order in the original document.
